name: solution-architecture
description: [discovery-phase pack · scoping] High-level solution design as a discovery deliverable — system context, logical components, data flow, integrations, NFRs (perf/scale/security/SLA), and tech-stack rationale. Not detailed design; feeds estimation and surfaces tech risks. Produces solution-architecture.md. Reads scope-doc.md, mvp-definition.md, risk-assumption-map.md.
